title: elaeocarpus fruticosus
intro: Elaeocarpus fruticosus, also known as the blue fig or small blue fig, is a species of flowering plant in the Elaeocarpaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus fruticosus include treating fever, sore throats, and skin conditions, as well as providing antioxidant and immune-boosting effects. Elaeocarpus fruticosus can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile natural remedy for various health issues.
